channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bears blasted by 49ers in Brown's head-coaching debut, drop to 4-9
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (WGN) — New head coach. Same old Chicago Bears. Thomas Brown made his head coaching debut in replacement of Matt Eberflus, but as they've done so many times this season, the Bears got off to a slow start on offense and the San Francisco 49ers wasted no time putting points on the board.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Instant analysis of 49ers’ 38-13 homecoming rout of hapless Bears
item.description: Brock Purdy and the 49ers (6-7) raced to a 24-0 halftime lead and cruised to a 38-13 home win Sunday over the Chicago Bears (4-9).
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Matchup set for 2024 DIRECTV Holiday Bowl at Snapdragon Stadium
item.description: The 45th annual DIRECTV Holiday Bowl will feature Syracuse vs. Washington State on December 27, 2024, at Snapdragon Stadium in San Diego, Sports San Diego announced Sunday. The game will be broadcast live on FOX.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: A hamstring injury silenced George Pickens. His Steelers teammates picked up the slack vs. Browns
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — A hamstring injury managed to do the one thing to George Pickens that nobody else has during the Pittsburgh Steelers wide receiver's three eventful years in the NFL, Pickens included. It kept him quiet. Temporarily anyway.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Scottie Scheffler ends his big year in the Bahamas with his 9th victory
item.description: NASSAU, Bahamas (AP) — Scottie Scheffler returned from a two-month break and nothing changed. He won the Hero World Challenge on Sunday with a 9-under 63 to tie the tournament record at Albany Golf Club and win by six shots.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Big Ten wins playoff selection derby, followed by SEC despite notable Alabama omission
item.description: College football's conference shakeup left concerns about two super conferences dominating the playoff field. They weren't totally unfounded or 100% borne out. The Big Ten, not the Southeastern Conference, was the biggest winner Sunday. The ACC scored, too.
item.dc:creator: JOHN ZENOR, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Saquon Barkley sets Eagles season rushing record and has Dickerson's NFL mark in his sights
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Saquon Barkley knew the Eagles season rushing record could be his on Sunday with the type of stellar performance that has become the standard during his first season in Philadelphia.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Kyle Whittingham will return for 2025 season
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a simple two word statement that made a resounding statement throughout the University of Utah athletic department. "I'm back." And with that, Utes head football coach Kyle Whittingham announced he will return to the program for his 21st season in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU to play Colorado in Alamo Bowl December 28
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU football team will be taking on a fellow Big 12 team in a bowl game this season. #17 BYU and #23 Colorado both accepted invitations to play in the Alama Bowl December 28th in San Antonio. The game will be televised on ABC4 at 5:30 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Cataldi promises hospitalized teammate Bove a goal and delivers as Fiorentina wins 8th straight
item.description: ROME (AP) — Danilo Cataldi texted hospitalized Fiorentina teammate Edoardo Bove to say that he would score for him Sunday and then fulfilled his promise in a 1-0 win over Cagliari on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Baker Mayfield throws for 3 TDs, Bucs take over 1st in NFC South with 28-13 win over Raiders
item.description: Baker Mayfield threw for 295 yards and three touchdowns, helping the Tampa Bay Buccaneers beat the Las Vegas Raiders 28-13 and take over sole possession of first place in the NFC South on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tourigny wins 100th game as Utah HC beats Buffalo, 5-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Michael Kesselring had a goal and an assist for the Utah Hockey Club, which handed the Buffalo Sabres their sixth straight loss with a 5-2 win at KeyBank Center on Saturday. "It's good for the confidence," Kesselring said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Georgia wins SEC in OT thriller over Texas despite Carson Beck’s injury, earns bye in College Football Playoff
item.description: The Georgia Bulldogs get a bye in the College Football Playoff after winning the SEC title game over Texas despite Carson Beck's arm injury.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Arizona State coach Kenny Dillingham sends clear message to playoff selection committee after winning Big 12
item.description: The 12-team College Football Playoff requires the top four seeds be conference champs. But Mountain West winner Boise State could keep ASU out of one of those coveted spots.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What happens when 'The Simpsons' join 'Monday Night Football'? Find out during Bengals-Cowboys
item.description: On Monday night, the entire Simpsons universe gets to experience it in a way not many could have imagined. The prime-time matchup between the Cincinnati Bengals and Dallas Cowboys will also take place at Springfield’s Atoms Stadium as part of “The Simpsons Funday Football” alternate broadcast.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz cruise to rare blowout win over Portland, 141-99
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In what has been an extremely difficult rebuilding year, the Utah Jazz will relish nights like this one.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes drop five-set thriller to Marquette to end season
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah women's volleyball team rallied from being down two sets to none against Marquette, only to lose the fifth and deciding set 15-12 to end their incredible turnaround season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Montrose Red Hawks receives send off before title game
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— Montrose High School’s Red Hawks are on the brink of history, entering the state championship game with a perfect record. For a team that hasn’t claimed a title in more than 70 years, the stakes couldn’t be higher.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Dosunmu's first career triple-double leads Bulls 139-124 over Spurs
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Nikola Vucevic had a season-high 39 points, Ayo Dosunmu had 27 points, 11 assists and 10 rebounds and the Chicago Bulls beat the San Antonio Spurs 139-124 on Thursday night with Victor Wembanyama sidelined with a back injury.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz commit 29 turnovers in 133-106 loss to OKC
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz lead the NBA in turnovers, and Tuesday night was their worst night yet. Utah committed a season-high 29 turnovers, 19 in the first half, as the Jazz go 0-4 in NBA Cup games with a 133-106 blowout loss at Oklahoma City.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Nick Rimando elected to National Soccer Hall of Fame
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Former Real Salt Lake goalkeeper Nick Rimando has been elected to the National Soccer Hall of Fame. Rimando will be enshrined with the Class of 2025 on May 3, 2025 in Frisco, Texas.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz come up short against Lakers, 105-104
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Anthony Davis had 33 points and 11 rebounds, LeBron James added 27 points and 14 assists, and the short-handed Los Angeles Lakers beat the Utah Jazz 105-104 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Monahan with goal and assist, Blue Jackets extend points streak to 6 with 6-3 win over Blackhawks
item.description: Sean Monahan had a goal and assist, and the Columbus Blue Jackets extended their points streak to six games with a 6-3 win over the Chicago Blackhawks on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9
